cluster7.verdict: DEFER — returns/creates live API-key material; frontend secret-masking (UX_UI 7.6) is a hard prerequisite before any bridging.
DEFER — credential lifecycle; bridge later WITH destructive gate + secret masking. check_permissions prerequisite now satisfied by 3B.
DEFER — tenancy-shaping writes; needs role-perm hardening review before LLM exposure (IsAuthenticated-only today).
DEFER — membership writes change who can see workspace data; bridge only with org/workspace-admin permission classes asserted.
BRIDGEABLE LATER (read) — IsOrganizationAdmin enforced by 3B check_permissions; deferred with the rest of the cluster.
DEFER — privilege escalation surface; requires explicit product sign-off + destructive-style confirmation.
DEFER — destructive on people-access; same bar as role updates.
DEFER — same as MemberRoleUpdateAPIView at workspace scope.
DEFER — same as MemberRemoveAPIView at workspace scope.
DO NOT BRIDGE — tenant creation is onboarding-flow only; no LLM use-case.
DEFER — org-level writes; needs org-admin perm assertion + product sign-off.
